name: QA 1996
description:
PCP QA Test No. 1996

Exercise the InfiniBand PMDA with mock libraries (no hardware required)



Copyright (c) 2025 Red Hat.



**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py ubuntu2404 reproduce
